case_title: MR.SEN SEI VS. AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TABRELA BROOKS, COMMUNITY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF MR. SEN SEI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TABRELA BROOKS, COMMUNITY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEI, MR.SEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEI, MR.SEN AS TO DEFENDANT AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEI, MR.SEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SEI, MR.SEN AS TO DEFENDANT AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2023 - SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO DEC-05-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF MUST HAVE DEFENDANT SERVED WITH A COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITH THE NEW COURT DATE AND TIME REFLECTED ON THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE (D. 506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-10-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY SEI, MR.SEN AVANATH CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2023 - JUDGMENT.
